page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m2.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 physical cores and 32 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The memory configuration consists of 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. This server does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance profile. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as evidenced by bottom-quartile results in stress-ng single-core and single-threaded gzip compression tests. However, the 32 dedicated physical cores deliver average multi-core performance, with middle-quartile results in stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU tests. Memory bandwidth, both cached and uncached, also performs within the average range.

Given the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is structured for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. Qualitative cost efficiency is favorable for multi-threaded processing tasks that can leverage the 32 dedicated cores without demanding high single-core speeds. Appropriate workloads include multi-threaded software compilation, parallel text processing, static web serving, and moderate database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m2.8xlarge is an x86_64 compute-oriented server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores and vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz. Equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, it provides a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Network performance is anchored by a 10 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Performance benchmarks reveal a contrast between weak single-core execution and average multi-core capabilities, as demonstrated in stress-ng and Geekbench multi-threaded tests. Memory bandwidth and database operations also align with mid-range performance tiers. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for parallelized workloads that benefit from high core counts but do not require extensive memory per core. It is suited for multi-threaded software compilation, static web serving, and parallel data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m2.8xlarge is an x86_64 server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps bandwidth, delivering average multi-core performance for parallel workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core x86_64 compute platform with a 1:2 memory-to-core ratio, optimized for parallelized multi-threaded workloads.
